steps.title: Distribute the factor
steps.content: Apply the $3$ to both terms inside the parentheses: $$3(ab-4)+5=3ab-12+5$$

steps.title: Combine the constants
steps.content: The variable term stays $3ab$, and the constants combine: $$-12+5=-7$$ So the equivalent expression is $$3ab-7$$ Choice A misses the multiplication by $3$ on $-4$, while choices C and D use the wrong constant. The answer is B.
